summary: Iteration 87 - Tested CCTV module improvements including Live View snapshot display, Setup Guide with 4 TV viewing options, improved Add DVR form with HTTP/RTSP ports, and backend snapshot/stream-info endpoints. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST DVRs during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CCTV module fully tested. Live View tab shows Pause/Play auto-refresh controls, branch filter, grid size toggles. Setup Guide tab has 4 TV viewing options (HDMI, Web App, Hik-Connect, iVMS-4200), DVR troubleshooting section, and RTSP URL format info. Add DVR dialog includes HTTP Port and RTSP Port fields for Local IP type. Backend snapshot endpoint returns 404 for non-existent cameras (expected). Stream-info endpoint returns proper data structure with type, channel, rtsp_main, rtsp_sub, etc.

features: No cameras message with Add DVR button when no cameras configured

tv_display_options: Option 1: Direct HDMI (Recommended) - Best quality, no internet needed
Option 2: SSC Track Web App on Smart TV - Works remotely over internet
Option 3: Hik-Connect Mobile App - Best for remote mobile access
Option 4: iVMS-4200 on PC/Laptop - Full feature access + recording playback
setup_guide_tab.dvr_web_view_setup: Includes Requirements section and Troubleshooting - No Display section

features: Shows No DVRs configured message when empty
RTSP URL displayed for local DVRs

backend_snapshot_endpoint.error_handling: Returns 404 with clear message for non-existent cameras

mocked_apis.note: Camera snapshots depend on real DVR hardware not present in test environment - this is expected behavior, not a mock

note: No actual Hikvision DVRs are connected to the test environment, so snapshot endpoints correctly return connection errors. This is expected behavior - the error handling is working correctly.
